Container.Name: PumpkinMC
Container.Overview:
Pumpkin is a high-performance Minecraft server software written entirely in Rust.
It aims to be a fast, efficient, and fully compatible alternative to the vanilla Java server, with low memory usage and quick startup times.
NOTE: Pumpkin is experimental software under active development. It is not yet feature-complete and is not recommended for production worlds. Always keep backups of your world data. The "latest" image tracks the most recent release build.
Default configuration files are generated in the data folder on first launch and can be edited there.

Config.Name: Server Data
Config.Description: Persistent folder for world data and configuration files (config.toml, etc).

Config.Name: RUST_LOG
Config.Description: Logging verbosity. Options: error, warn, info, debug, trace.
